scripts.check:all: npm run check:ci && npm run docs:build
scripts.check:ci: npm run check:fast && npm run check:web-browser-smoke
scripts.check:fast: python3 scripts/check_device_manifest.py && npm run check:product-schema && npm run check:local-artifacts && npm run check:config && npm run check:backup-contract && npm run check:model-contract && npm run check:web-smoke && npm run check:types && npm run check:firmware-parser && npm run check:firmware-modals && npm run check:firmware-display-tokens && npm run check:firmware-ha-bindings && npm run check:firmware-card-runtime && npm run check:firmware-release && npm run check:device-matrix && npm run check:device-profiles && npm run check:release-confidence && npm run check:release-changelog && npm run check:generated && python3 scripts/generate_device_slots.py --check && python3 scripts/check_icon_groups.py && npm run check:timezones && npm run check:public-firmware-script
scripts.check:product: npm run check:product-schema && npm run check:generated && python3 scripts/generate_device_slots.py --check && npm run check:device-profiles && npm run check:model-contract && npm run check:backup-contract && npm run check:web-smoke && npm run check:firmware-card-runtime && npm run check:release-confidence && npm run check:public-firmware-script
